info.name: Workday Extend Execute a graph query

items.docs: Executes a graph query against the Workday data model. Supports field selection, filtering, relationship traversal, and pagination. Returns the requested business objects with only the selected fields.

info.name: Workday Extend Execute a WQL query

items.docs: Executes a Workday Query Language (WQL) query for complex data retrieval. WQL uses SQL-like syntax to query business objects and supports filtering, sorting, aggregation, and relationship traversal. Results can be paginated using limit and offset parameters within the query.

info.name: Workday Extend Retrieve the graph schema

items.docs: Returns the full graph schema including all available business object types, their fields, relationships, and query capabilities. Used for introspection and discovery of the data model.

info.name: Workday Extend List available business object types

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Returns a collection of available business object types that can be queried through the Graph API, including their descriptions and available fields.

info.name: Workday Extend Retrieve a specific business object type schema

params.name: typeName
params.description: The name of the business object type

items.docs: Returns the full schema definition for a specific business object type, including all fields, their types, relationships to other objects, and available query operations.
